requirements: Use structural pattern matching, pathlib.Path, explicit type hints
test_desc: Tests validate functional equivalence + modern syntax usage
business_context: A platform team is modernizing shared Python helpers used by deployment scripts and internal maintenance jobs before the Python 3.12 rollout.
stakeholder_request: Keep the public behavior exactly the same while replacing legacy control flow and file handling with modern, readable Python.
acceptance_checks: Preserve config lookup behavior for known and unknown keys
Use pathlib-based file access instead of os.path + manual open/close
Add precise type hints without changing outputs
pitfalls: Do not break integer return values for db_port
Do not change the base /data path assumption
Do not introduce extra helper APIs that alter the function contract
runtime_budget: This helper runs in short-lived operational scripts, so startup overhead should stay minimal.
